prompt: Find all .js files in the bridge/ directory that contain the string "WebSocket".
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files matching a text pattern within a directory tree.

pattern.description: Text or regex pattern to search for in file contents

file_pattern.description: Glob pattern to filter files, e.g. *.js

tools.name: shell_grep
tools.description: Search for text patterns in files using grep.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and directories in a given path.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a text file.

rubric: 1=no tool call or completely wrong approach, 2=used shell_grep or list_directory instead of search_files, 3=used search_files but missing file_pattern for .js or wrong directory path, 4=used search_files with correct path and pattern but minor issues with file_pattern, 5=uses search_files with path pointing to bridge/, pattern "WebSocket", and file_pattern "*.js"
